channel.title: unhappiness on Mez Says
channel.description: Recent content in unhappiness on Mez Says

item.title: Currys And Why The High Street Should Die
item.description: I recently bought a new camera to play with (Fuji X-E1) from the long standing high street retailer in the UK, Currys. I bought the accessories (a camera bag, a lens, memory cards, and a spare battery) from the online retailer Amazon. I vowed never to use one of them again. Ever.

item.title: Porting nightmare
item.description: Here in the UK we are allowed to port our mobile phone number to another provider when we leave. This means that you can keep the same number but switch contracts to a different provider. However you can’t do this from within the same provider.

item.title: Friday Saturday un happies
item.description: Sway.
